title: Chillena Lyrics Raja Rani Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Chillena
Singer:  Clinton Cerejo, Alphonse, Alka
Music: G. V. Prakash Kumar
Movie: Raja Rani		 .
Lyrics in Thanglish
Exact translation of tamil words
Chillena oru mazhai thuli
ennai nenaikudhey penney
siragugal yaar koduthadhu
nenjam parakudhey munney

un vizhigaliely oh ho..
naan vazhgiren penney
un kanavugalaa hoi ..
naan maarinen kanney

Ada karupatiye en cheeni kilange
sirichi kavukaadha
en kannukuttiye kamma karaye
nee kappal ottaadha

Kannaala paakaama kannaalam pannalaama?
kai korthu polaama ?

Konjam paarthu vidu
konjam pesi vidu endru
en vizhigal haiyayo enna thitta
kodai kaala mazhai
vandhu pona pinnum
saalyoram maram thannaale neer sotta

Ennai thaakum puyaley
iravodu kaayum veyiley
unnaaley .. noolilaa
kaatraadi aaneney .
adi penne .. adi kanney..
naan vilundhaaal unpadham serveney

un vizhigaliely oh ho..
naan vazhgiren penney
un kanavugalaa hoi ..
naan maarinen kanney

Chillena oru mazhai thuli
ennai nenaikudhey penney
siragugal yaar koduthadhu
nenjam parakudhey munney

Kadhal vandhavudam kaichal vandhadhadi
meendum naan pilaikka
muthangal tharuvaaya
Kobam kolgayilum
kiranga vaikudhad, meendum orumurai
nee kobathil paarpaayaa

Aalai kollum azhage,
nizha kooda aazhagin nagaley
oru naalummmmm .. mmmmm..
kuraiyaadhaa ohooo...
pudhu bodhai kannoram
thandhaaye
anaithalum anayaadha
oru theeyaai nenjoram
vandhaaye..

adi idam valamaa..
naan aadinen penney
oru idi mazhayaai..
ennai thaakinaai munneyEnglish Translation
I tried my best :)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Chillena?

The song Chillena expresses the feelings of love and longing, portraying a romantic connection between the characters in the movie.

What is the plot context of Raja Rani related to this song?

In Raja Rani, the song plays during a pivotal moment that highlights the blossoming romance between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of Chillena?

The song is sung by Alka, Alphonse, and Clinton Cerejo, each bringing their unique style to the performance.

Who composed the music for Chillena?

The music for Chillena was composed by the talented GV PrakashKumar.

When was Chillena released?

Chillena was released on August 24, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Chillena from Raja Rani encapsulates the joy and excitement of young love. It features a harmonious blend of vocals by Alka, Alphonse, and Clinton Cerejo, creating a soothing and romantic atmosphere. The lyrics, penned by Na Muthukumar, beautifully express the emotions of longing and affection. This melody serves as a backdrop to the evolving relationship between the protagonists, making it a memorable highlight of the film.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Chillena from the movie Raja Rani is a delightful romantic duet that beautifully captures the essence of love. With the enchanting voices of Alka, Alphonse, and Clinton Cerejo, this song is a perfect blend of melody and emotion, crafted by the talented GV PrakashKumar. Experience the magic of this collaboration that resonates with every heart yearning for love.
stanzaMeanings: Chillena, a raindrop is thinking of me, girl. Who gave me wings? My heart is fluttering in front of you.
Oh, with your eyes, I am living, girl. Are you my dreams? I have changed, my dear.
Hey, don't laugh at my little girl, my dear. Don't let the boat sink.
Shall we look at each other without seeing? Shall we hold hands?
Just look a little, just talk a little. My eyes are wondering, why are you scolding me? After the rain, the tree will shed its water.
The storm that takes me away will also take you away, my dear. In the thread of fate, I have become a part of you. Oh girl, oh dear, if I fall, I will serve you.
Oh, with your eyes, I am living, girl. Are you my dreams? I have changed, my dear.
Chillena, a raindrop is thinking of me, girl. Who gave me wings? My heart is fluttering in front of you.
Love has come, and the struggle has come. Will I give you the pearls again? Even in anger, will you see me again?
The beautiful one who takes away the troubles, the city of joy, will never fade away. Oh, the new light has come, and everything has become a beautiful dream.
Is this place good? I danced, girl, like a little rain. You have taken me away.
